---
title: "llm.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/intel/llm.ts"
loc: 46
complexity: 10
logic_score: 5.60
style_score: 2.78
intel_score: 7.22
overall_score: 3.97
---

## Intent
Orchestrates Babel AST parsing for the static analysis engine.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [FileData](file://../analyzer.js)

### Exports
- `code`
- `code`
- `MockProvider`
- `filename`
- `code`
- `GeminiProvider`
- `directive`
- `mock`
- `defaultProvider`
- `defaultProvider`
